title: Pre-meditation page layout adjustments and ReflectionPhase component extraction

requirements.summary: Move the MindfulnessGuide section to the bottom of the pre-meditation setup phase layout
acceptanceCriteria: In the pre-meditation setup phase, the MindfulnessGuide container appears below the combined session controls container.
All other pre-meditation controls (meditation carousel, duration, ambient sound, buttons) appear above the MindfulnessGuide.

file_operations.description: Reorder the JSX elements in the setup phase so that MindfulnessGuide is rendered after the combined controls container. Move the MindfulnessGuide JSX block to appear as the last child element within the setup phase content area.

requirements.summary: Center the MindfulnessGuide title and make it dynamic based on selected meditation type
acceptanceCriteria: The MindfulnessGuide title is horizontally centered within its container.
The title text dynamically reflects the currently selected meditation type (e.g., 'Mindfulness Meditation Guide', 'Metta Meditation Guide').
The title is positioned at the top of the MindfulnessGuide container.

file_operations.description: Add a 'type' prop to the MindfulnessGuide component that accepts the currently selected meditation type. Update the title element to use centered text alignment (text-center class) and construct the title dynamically as '{type} Meditation Guide' with proper capitalization. Ensure the title is positioned at the top of the container.
Pass the selectedType state as a prop to the MindfulnessGuide component so the title reflects the currently selected meditation type from the carousel.

requirements.summary: Move the 'More Details' button to the bottom center of the MindfulnessGuide container
acceptanceCriteria: The 'More Details' button is positioned at the bottom of the MindfulnessGuide container.
The 'More Details' button is horizontally centered within the container.

file_operations.description: Reorder the JSX so the 'More Details' button appears as the last element in the container. Apply flex utilities to ensure the button is centered horizontally (flex justify-center or mx-auto) and positioned at the bottom of the container.

requirements.summary: Group Duration, Ambient Sound Picker, and action buttons into a single unified container
acceptanceCriteria: Duration, Ambient Sound Picker, and Begin/Save Ritual buttons are wrapped in one container element.
The container has consistent card/panel styling matching the rest of the pre-meditation page (e.g., bg-card/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-border/50).
All three sections remain functional within the combined container.

file_operations.description: Wrap the DurationRangeInput component, AmbientMusicCarousel component, and the action buttons (Begin Meditation and Save as Ritual) into a single container div. Apply consistent card styling classes (bg-card/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-border/50 p-6 space-y-6 or similar) to the wrapper. Ensure proper spacing between the three sections within the container.

requirements.summary: Extract the reflection phase JSX into a standalone ReflectionPhase component
acceptanceCriteria: A new ReflectionPhase component file exists and contains the full reflection phase UI (mood grid, energy grid, reflection textarea, favorite checkbox, Save & Continue button).
PreMeditationPage's reflection phase block is replaced with a single `<ReflectionPhase ... />` invocation.
The ReflectionPhase component receives all state and callbacks as props from PreMeditationPage.
The ReflectionPhase component wraps its content in PageBackgroundShell with StandardPageNav, matching the original layout.
Saving a reflection still works end-to-end (records session, creates journal entry, navigates away).

file_operations.description: Create a new ReflectionPhase component that accepts props for selectedType, duration, selectedMoods, handleMoodToggle, selectedEnergy, setSelectedEnergy, reflection, setReflection, isFavorite, setIsFavorite, handleSaveReflection, recordSession.isPending, createJournalEntry.isPending, and onBack handler. The component renders the session complete header, mood selection grid (calm, happy, neutral, anxious, sad), energy level selection grid (balanced, energized, restless, tired), reflection textarea, favorite checkbox, and Save & Continue button. Wrap the content in PageBackgroundShell with StandardPageNav for consistent layout. Apply the same styling and structure as the current inline reflection phase in PreMeditationPage.

Replace the inline reflection phase JSX block (the entire conditional render for phase === 'reflection') with a single <ReflectionPhase /> component invocation. Pass all required state and callbacks as props to ReflectionPhase: selectedType, duration, selectedMoods, handleMoodToggle, selectedEnergy, setSelectedEnergy, reflection, setReflection, isFavorite, setIsFavorite, handleSaveReflection, recordSession.isPending, createJournalEntry.isPending, and a navigate or onBack handler. Import the ReflectionPhase component at the top of the file.
